---
title: "Hindu College, Calcutta"
---

## Hindu College, Calcutta

**Type:** organization

### About

The Hindu (later Presidency) College Calcutta, were in correspondence with CMY about the republication of her <i>Landmarks of History</i>, which was used as a textbook during the 1860s.

### Letters Mentioning This Organization


---

[← Back to all letters](../letters.html)
